en.q: When you imagine stepping back from day-to-day leadership, how clear are you on what your next chapter looks like?

options.text: I haven't really thought about it
I have vague ideas but nothing defined
I have a clear, defined next chapter

hr.q: Kada zamislite da se povlačite iz svakodnevnog vodstva, koliko vam je jasno kako izgleda vaše sljedeće poglavlje?

options.text: Imam nejasne ideje, ali ništa definirano

en.q: How comfortable are you when decisions in the business are made differently than you would make them?

options.text: Very uncomfortable — I would step back in
Fully comfortable — I trust the process

hr.q: Koliko vam je ugodno kada se odluke u poslu donose drugačije nego što biste ih vi donijeli?

en.q: When were you last unavailable from the business for four or more consecutive weeks without a crisis arising?

options.text: Never — that would not be possible

hr.q: Kada ste posljednji put bili odsutni iz posla četiri ili više tjedana zaredom bez da je nastupila kriza?

options.text: Nikad — to ne bi bilo moguće
Prije više godina, uz opsežnu pripremu

en.q: How clear is the next generation on whether they want to be involved in the family business?

options.text: We have never discussed it explicitly
It has been hinted at but not decided
All have made considered, informed decisions

hr.q: Koliko je sljedećoj generaciji jasno žele li biti uključeni u obiteljski posao?

options.text: Nikad nismo eksplicitno razgovarali o tome
Svi su donijeli promišljene, informirane odluke

en.q: Have any next-generation family members worked outside the family business in real roles for three or more years?

options.text: All who plan to be involved have done so

hr.q: Jesu li članovi sljedeće generacije radili izvan obiteljskog posla u stvarnim ulogama tri ili više godina?

en.q: How would you assess the next generation's readiness to lead the business today?

options.text: Limited — would need close ongoing support
Moderately ready — could lead with mentoring

hr.q: Kako biste procijenili spremnost sljedeće generacije da vodi posao danas?

options.text: Nisu spremni — značajno bi se mučili
Umjereno spremni — mogli bi voditi uz mentorstvo

en.q: Do you have a written family constitution or charter?

options.text: No, and we have not discussed it
We have talked about it but not written anything
A draft exists or is in progress

hr.q: Imate li pisani obiteljski ustav ili povelju?

options.text: Ne, i nismo razgovarali o tome
Razgovarali smo, ali ništa nije napisano
Nacrt postoji ili je u izradi

en.q: Does the operating business have an active board, including non-family members?

options.text: Board with one or two non-family advisors
Independent board with majority non-family directors

hr.q: Ima li operativno poslovanje aktivnu upravu koja uključuje članove izvan obitelji?

options.text: Uprava s jednim ili dva neobiteljska savjetnika
Nezavisna uprava s većinom neobiteljskih direktora

en.q: How are major business decisions formally made and documented?

options.text: Informally — whoever is in the room decides
The founder decides; others are informed
Through structured discussions with key stakeholders
Through documented governance processes with clear roles

hr.q: Kako se važne poslovne odluke formalno donose i dokumentiraju?

options.text: Neformalno — odlučuje tko je u prostoriji
Dokumentiranim upravljačkim procesima s jasnim ulogama

en.q: Have you openly discussed succession with the next generation in the past twelve months?

options.text: No — the topic feels too sensitive
Yes, in one or two structured conversations

hr.q: Jeste li u zadnjih dvanaest mjeseci otvoreno razgovarali o sukcesiji sa sljedećom generacijom?

options.text: Da, u jednom ili dva strukturirana razgovora

en.q: When family members disagree about the business, what typically happens?

options.text: The most senior person's view prevails
We discuss but resolution is informal
We have a structured process to surface and resolve disagreement

hr.q: Kada se članovi obitelji ne slažu oko posla, što se obično događa?

options.text: Imamo strukturiran proces za iznošenje i rješavanje neslaganja

en.q: How well does the next generation understand the size and nature of the family wealth?

options.text: They know roughly but not specifically
They understand the operating business but not the broader picture
They have a complete and current understanding

hr.q: Koliko dobro sljedeća generacija razumije veličinu i prirodu obiteljske imovine?

options.text: Razumiju operativni posao, ali ne širu sliku

en.q: Is there a shareholders' agreement covering transfers, buyouts, and family member exits?

options.text: A basic agreement, not recently reviewed
A comprehensive agreement, reviewed within five years

hr.q: Postoji li dioničarski sporazum koji pokriva prijenose, otkupe i izlaske članova obitelji?

options.text: Cjelovit sporazum, pregledan unutar pet godina

en.q: What happens if a family shareholder divorces or dies unexpectedly?

options.text: We have not planned for that

hr.q: Što se događa ako se član obitelji dioničar razvede ili neočekivano umre?

options.text: Potpuno dokumentirano, pravno čvrsto, obiteljski usklađeno

en.q: Have ownership and operational leadership been intentionally separated as roles?

options.text: No — the same people own and run the business
We have discussed it but not implemented

hr.q: Jesu li vlasništvo i operativno vodstvo namjerno razdvojeni kao uloge?

options.text: Ne — isti ljudi posjeduju i vode posao

en.q: Have you written down what the family wealth and business are for — beyond financial return?

options.text: Yes — articulated and shared with the family

hr.q: Jeste li zapisali za što služe obiteljska imovina i posao — iznad financijskog povrata?

options.text: Da — artikulirano i podijeljeno s obitelji

en.q: Is there a vehicle (foundation, philanthropic structure, mission-driven entity) that expresses the family's purpose?

options.text: We have discussed but not established one

hr.q: Postoji li vozilo (zaklada, filantropska struktura, entitet vođen misijom) koje izražava svrhu obitelji?

en.q: When you imagine the family business in fifty years, how vivid is that picture?

options.text: I have not thought that far
A clear vision shared by the current generation

hr.q: Kada zamislite obiteljski posao za pedeset godina, koliko je ta slika živa?

options.text: Jasna vizija koju dijeli sadašnja generacija
